news.t: A Roundup of June's Most Notable ETF Launches
VanEck Launches Data Center Supply Chain ETF (RACK) to Capture AI Infrastructure Buildout

holdings.infoBox: RACK is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amphenol stock at 4.87%, Micron Technology at 4.81%, Cameco at 4.47%, Constellation Energy at 4.42%, and Broadcom at 4.38%.

overview.description: The VanEck Data Center Supply Chain ETF (RACK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index providing exposure to companies deriving significant revenues from activities associated with modern data centers. Companies may be domiciled outside of the US and may include companies of any capitalization. RACK was launched on Jun 1, 2026 and is issued by VanEck.
infoTable: MarketVector Data Center Supply Chain Index

data.text: June has seen many ETF launches, from pure-play AI memory chip thematics to an autism impact fund that donates returns to nonprofits. With a record breaking 214 launches, the ETF landscape continues t...

data.title: VanEck Launches Data Center Supply Chain ETF (RACK) to Capture AI Infrastructure Buildout
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck launches RACK, focused on companies supplying semiconductors, power, cooling systems, grid equipment needed to support AI infrastructure demand.
